title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
